title: Field Engineer
description:
About Us:

Atlas RoboTech is at the forefront of innovation in construction robotics. A member of Teambuild Construction Group, we are committed to reshaping the built environment through advanced robotic solutions that improve safety, productivity, and sustainability. Join us on our mission to redefine construction.

Job Overview:

We are looking for a proactive and resourceful Field Engineer to support the day-to-day execution of robotic deployments, technical testing, and coordination across project sites and stakeholders. This role bridges the gap between innovation and on-the-ground implementation and is ideal for someone with strong technical aptitude and operational discipline.

Key Responsibilities:

Operations & Deployment

  • Plan and coordinate deployment of robotics solutions at construction sites
  • Liaise with project teams, site supervisors, and other relevant stakeholders to ensure smooth operations
  • Track equipment usage, maintenance schedules, and troubleshooting
  • Support logistics, scheduling, and documentation of site trials and commercial rollouts

Technical Support & Testing

  • Assist in testing and commissioning of robotics systems
  • Troubleshoot technical issues and provide first-level support on-site
  • Work with engineering teams on data collection, performance validation, and user feedback
  • Ensure adherence to safety protocols and compliance standards during operations

Project & Process Coordination

  • Maintain project documentation, risk assessments, and operational records
  • Help standardize workflows and SOPs for robotic use in construction environments
  • Collaborate with leadership and product teams to relay site insights and improvements
  • Any other duties or ad hoc tasks as assigned, in line with operational needs and project requirements.

Requirements:

  • Nitec / Higher Nitec / Diploma in Engineering, Mechatronics, or related field
  • 1 – 2 years of relevant experience
  • Strong problem-solving skills and hands-on technical ability
  • Good organizational and project coordination skills
  • Comfortable working in site environments and engaging with diverse teams
  • Passionate about innovation and improving how things are built

What We Offer:

  • A front-row seat to the future of construction technology
  • Hands-on exposure to robotics, field trials, and cross-functional collaboration
  • Career development and leadership growth opportunities (within the Teambuild Group)
  • Supportive, agile, and innovative work culture
  • Competitive salary and benefits
